locations.name: 塞伦盖蒂国家公园

locations.name: 东非
locations.summary: 东非即非洲的东部地区，根據聯合國的次分區共有18個国家或屬地： 埃塞俄比亞、索馬里（含索馬利蘭）、厄立特里亚和吉布提，以上几國在地理上稱為非洲之角 坦桑尼亚、肯尼亚、乌干达、卢旺达、布隆迪和南苏丹，以上六國組成東非共同體 赞比亚、津巴布韦…

locations.name: 乌干达
locations.summary: 烏干達共和國（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Uganda，英語：Republic of Uganda），通稱烏干達，是位於東非的內陸國家。 烏干達名稱來自於過去班圖人建立的布干達王國。歐洲列強在十九世紀後葉進入東非內陸後，烏干達在18…

relations.subject: White-headed buffalo weaver
relations.evidence: boehmiSerengeti National Park, Tanzania | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | parent_authority = Reichenbach, 1863 | taxon = Dinemellia dinemelli | authority = (Rüppell, 1845) }} The white-headed buffalo weaver or white-faced buffalo-weaver (Dinemellia dinemelli) is a species of passerine bird in the family Ploceidae native to East Africa. The buffalo part of its name derives from its habit of following the African buffalo, feeding on disturbed insects. Two subspecies are recognized

relations.subject: White-headed buffalo weaver
relations.evidence: boehmiSerengeti National Park, Tanzania | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | parent_authority = Reichenbach, 1863 | taxon = Dinemellia dinemelli | authority = (Rüppell, 1845) }} The white-headed buffalo weaver or white-faced buffalo-weaver (Dinemellia dinemelli) is a species of passerine bird in the family Ploceidae native to East Africa. The buffalo part of its name derives from its habit of following the African buffalo, feeding on disturbed insects. Two subspecies are recognized

relations.subject: White-headed buffalo weaver
relations.evidence: The white-headed buffalo weaver is native to the African countries of Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, Sudan, Tanzania, and Uganda. It prefers habitats such as savanna, and shrublands, but especially dry brush and acacia thickets
